critical_issues.title: max_runs Blocking Legitimate Trades

log_entries: 2026-02-27 19:27:38 - ScalpEngine - WARNING - Trade not opened for GBP/JPY SELL: reason=max_runs
2026-02-27 19:29:31 - ScalpEngine - WARNING - Trade not opened for GBP/JPY SELL: reason=max_runs
Multiple occurrences every 1-2 minutes for GBP/JPY, EUR/GBP, GBP/USD on Feb 27

critical_issues.root_cause: consol-recommend3 Phase 1.2 (max_runs auto-reset) not fully implemented or not working. max_runs counter persists from previous trades and blocks legitimate new entries even when no open/pending position exists for that pair.

impact.potential_pnl_loss: Unknown - blocked from trading improved opportunities

critical_issues.recommendation: URGENT: Debug max_runs auto-reset logic. Verify execution_enforcer.reset_run_count() is being called and working correctly.

critical_issues.title: Trailing Stop Loss Not Verifiable - EUR/JPY Loss Exceeded Static SL

evidence.issue: Exit price 184.201 > Static SL 184.20. If trailing SL was working, SL should have moved as trade went in profit (182.60 down to lowest point), then moved back up as EUR/JPY rallied. But loss of 28.22 pips exceeds 160 pips static range.

critical_issues.root_cause: Trailing stop loss logic unverified. Config shows ATR_TRAILING but actual behavior unknown. Loss amount suggests trade exited at static SL when it should have been protected by trailing logic.

impact.unprotected_trades: Unknown - all trades use ATR_TRAILING, but verification needed
impact.strategy_viability: Cannot determine if ATR_TRAILING is working at all

critical_issues.recommendation: URGENT: Verify trailing SL implementation. Add detailed logging of SL moves. Check if trailing SL is actually being applied in OANDA orders.

critical_issues.title: Manual Trade Closures - 80% of Trades Closed Manually

examples: 2026-02-25 11:25:21 - MARKET_ORDER TRADE_CLOSE GBP/JPY (immediately after fill, -0.88 loss)
2026-02-25 11:42:28 - MARKET_ORDER TRADE_CLOSE AUD/JPY (immediately after fill, -0.44 loss)
evidence.pattern: Many trades closed seconds to minutes after entry (GBP/JPY after 0 seconds, AUD/JPY after 36 seconds) at losses

critical_issues.root_cause: Unknown - no clear indication of why trades are being closed manually. Could be: (1) User manual intervention, (2) Scalp-Engine auto-close bug, (3) UI manual close button, (4) Risk manager triggered.

impact.strategy_undermined: System designed to auto-manage to TP/SL, but 80% manual override suggests fundamental issue

critical_issues.recommendation: URGENT: Investigate root cause of manual closures. Add logging to all close paths in Scalp-Engine and UI. Check execution logs for CLOSE commands.

critical_issues.title: DeepSeek Parser Broken - 0 Opportunities Extracted

evidence.llm_consensus_pattern: Opportunities show /2 or /3 consensus (e.g., 2/3) but denominator should be /4 if all 4 LLMs contributing
evidence.parser_status: Unknown - no log evidence of DeepSeek recommendations parsed
evidence.market_state_contents: Only ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Synthesis; no DeepSeek

critical_issues.root_cause: DeepSeek output format mismatch (narrative vs JSON) or parser not recognizing output. consol-recommend3 Phase 2.3 documents this but chose to document-only rather than fix.
critical_issues.recommendation: MEDIUM-TERM: Either (a) fix DeepSeek parser to extract JSON or narrative format, or (b) disable DeepSeek and recalculate consensus thresholds.

critical_issues.title: Claude API Exhausted - LLM Tier 3 Missing
critical_issues.root_cause: Anthropic API credit usage exceeded. Claude is in Tier 3 (optional) but was enabled and used until exhausted.
critical_issues.recommendation: Add Claude API billing monitoring. Disable Claude or add credit limits to prevent exhaustion during live trading.

high_priority_issues.title: Duplicate Blocking Too Aggressive - Blocks Legitimate Improvements

log_entries: 2026-02-27 19:35:10 - RED FLAG: BLOCKED DUPLICATE - GBP/USD SELL - already have an order
2026-02-27 19:35:11 - RED FLAG: BLOCKED DUPLICATE - EUR/GBP BUY - already have an order
Pattern repeats every 1-2 minutes across multiple pairs
evidence.false_positive_rate: Unknown - some duplicates legitimate, some may block improvements

high_priority_issues.root_cause: ONLY ONE ORDER PER PAIR rule prevents improved entries (better price, better SL) even when original order has aged or entry price changed significantly.

impact.market_condition_adaptation: System cannot adapt to price changes

high_priority_issues.recommendation: Revise duplicate logic: Allow new order if entry price improves by ≥5 pips OR SL/TP changes meaningfully (implemented in consol-recommend3 Phase 3.1 but apply earlier).

high_priority_issues.title: Consensus Denominator Mismatch - Shows /4 but Only 2-3 LLMs Available

evidence.consensus_display: Market state UI shows '2/3 consensus' for some opportunities
evidence.denominator_calculation: Uses fixed 4, should use actual count

high_priority_issues.root_cause: market_bridge.py consensus calculation uses fixed base_llms = ['chatgpt', 'gemini', 'claude', 'synthesis']. Does not account for missing/unavailable LLMs. consol-recommend3 Phase 2.1 was supposed to document this but no fix yet.

impact.trade_rejection: May reject trades that meet actual consensus when denominator wrong

high_priority_issues.recommendation: Fix consensus denominator to count actual available LLMs, not hardcoded 4.

high_priority_issues.title: Trading Hours Enforcement Unclear - System Allowed Weekend Trades

evidence.weekend_trades_evidence: Tickets on Feb 22 (Saturday) and Feb 24-25 (Monday-Tuesday) show normal trading, but Feb 22 is weekend
evidence.enforcement_mechanism: TradingHoursManager exists but enforcement visibility missing from logs
evidence.no_clear_logs: No 'Trading hours check', 'Weekend blocked', or similar messages in Scalp-Engine logs

high_priority_issues.root_cause: Trading hours enforcement logic may not be active, or logs do not show enforcement decisions. unclear if trades were prevented or allowed.

impact.slippage_risk: Weekend/low-liquidity times may have wider spreads

high_priority_issues.recommendation: Add explicit logging for trading hours checks. Verify TradingHoursManager.can_open_new_trade() is being called at execution time.

high_priority_issues.title: Position Sizing Formula Unclear - Units Vary Without Clear Logic

evidence.units_pattern: EUR/USD uses 1509, others use 2000 or different amounts
evidence.risk_calculation: No logging of position size calculation formula

high_priority_issues.root_cause: Position sizing formula in risk_manager.py unclear. May be using ATR-based sizing (varies per pair/timeframe) but not documented.

impact.inconsistent_risk: Different pairs may have different risk per trade
impact.risk_management_uncertainty: Cannot verify 2% or 1% risk per trade rule

high_priority_issues.recommendation: Document position sizing formula. Add logging of calculation: risk_amount → units.

high_priority_issues.title: Excessive Order Replacements - 30+ per hour on some pairs

evidence.replacement_pattern: EUR/USD: Create order, cancel, create, cancel… repeated 20+ times in 2 hours (Feb 23, 07:00-09:00)
evidence.oanda_log_impact: Creates 40+ orders in 2 hours for single pair

high_priority_issues.root_cause: Pending order review/replace logic may be too aggressive. Replaces on every cycle even for small price improvements (<1 pip). consol-recommend3 Phase 3.1 added REPLACE_ENTRY_MIN_PIPS (default 5 pips) but review cycle may still be too tight.

impact.opportunity_cost: May miss fills during replace cycle

high_priority_issues.recommendation: Verify REPLACE_ENTRY_MIN_PIPS=5 is enforced. Reduce review cycle frequency or increase min pip threshold.

medium_priority_issues.title: Sync Mismatch - Open/Pending Trades Between Scalp-Engine, UI, OANDA

evidence.ui_open_trades: UI shows 2-3 open trades at times
evidence.oanda_open_trades: Actual OANDA positions sometimes differ from UI display
evidence.pending_orders: Engine pending orders may not match UI pending list

medium_priority_issues.root_cause: Trade sync happens at startup (_sync_with_oanda()) but may not catch intra-session changes. Updates on every POST /trades but updates may lag.

impact.decision_quality: Operators making decisions on incorrect state

medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Implement continuous sync or faster update frequency. Log sync mismatches for debugging.

medium_priority_issues.title: Orphan Trades on OANDA Not Accounted For in Scalp-Engine

evidence.orphan_definition: Trades open on OANDA but no record in Scalp-Engine execution_history.json
evidence.detection_method: Manual check of OANDA vs logs required
evidence.status: Unverified in logs - no clear evidence of orphan trades, but manual review checklist asks for this

medium_priority_issues.root_cause: If Scalp-Engine crashes and loses execution state, orphan trades may result. sync_with_oanda() runs at startup to catch these.

impact.risk_management: Position limits may be wrong if orphans not counted

medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add periodic orphan trade detection logging. Log any discrepancies between Scalp-Engine and OANDA.

medium_priority_issues.title: RL Database Not Running Daily Learning on Schedule

evidence.evidence_of_evaluation: No logs of daily_learning() execution on Render
evidence.weight_updates: Unclear if weights are being recalculated

medium_priority_issues.root_cause: consol-recommend3 Phase 1.2 may have issues with outcome evaluation. Daily learning may not be finding matches between recommendations and OANDA outcomes.

impact.rl_system_broken: Weights not updating based on performance

medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add logging to verify daily_learning() runs and evaluates outcomes. Check OutcomeEvaluator._find_matching_oanda_trades().

medium_priority_issues.title: DeepSeek Parser Not Extracting Opportunities

evidence.deepseek_weight: Set to 0.0 or not included in opportunities
evidence.recommendation_parser: No log evidence of DeepSeek opportunities parsed
evidence.output_format: DeepSeek may be outputting narrative instead of expected format

medium_priority_issues.root_cause: recommendation_parser.py expects JSON or specific narrative format. DeepSeek output may differ. No fallback parser implemented.

impact.consensus_calculation: Uses /3 or /4 depending on counting method

medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Either fix parser to handle DeepSeek output format, or disable DeepSeek and adjust min_consensus_level.

medium_priority_issues.title: Claude API Credit Exhaustion Not Prevented

evidence.impact: Trades made with 3/4 LLMs instead of 4/4

medium_priority_issues.root_cause: No API credit monitoring or usage limits set on Claude client. No alert when credits running low.
medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add Claude API credit monitoring. Set monthly usage limits or alerts at 80% consumption.

medium_priority_issues.title: OANDA Log Shows 0 Characters When No OANDA Activity

evidence.log_frequency: OANDA logs requested multiple times daily in config-api logs
evidence.content_when_no_activity: File may be empty or minimal, returns 0 chars

medium_priority_issues.root_cause: Config API /logs/oanda endpoint returns 0 bytes when no trades. Documented in USER_GUIDE but confusing to operators.

impact.diagnostic_difficulty: Hard to tell if logs not written vs no activity

medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Add explicit message when no OANDA activity: 'No OANDA trades in this period' instead of empty response.

medium_priority_issues.title: Config Last Updated Timestamp Not Clearly Displayed

evidence.UI_display: May not clearly show staleness or last update time

medium_priority_issues.root_cause: Config last_updated field added but UI integration may be incomplete.

impact.config_staleness: Operators may use stale config without noticing
impact.decision_quality: Settings may be out of date

medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Verify UI clearly displays 'Config last updated: [timestamp]' and alerts if >1 hour old.

medium_priority_issues.title: Entry Point Alert Throttle May Still Cause Log Spam

evidence.entry_point_hit_logs: May appear frequently if multiple pair/opportunities match
evidence.throttle_window: Implemented in consol-recommend3 Phase 1.5 (10 min window)
evidence.log_level: Throttled to DEBUG after first hit, but initial hit at INFO

medium_priority_issues.root_cause: Throttle window is 10 minutes, and only throttles per (pair, direction). Multiple pairs hitting entry = multiple alerts.

impact.noise: Can still generate 5-10 alerts per hour

medium_priority_issues.recommendation: Monitor actual frequency. Consider extending throttle to 30 min or reducing to DEBUG tier immediately.

medium_priority_issues.title: RedFlag Duplicate Throttle Window Allows Some Noise

evidence.frequency: Multiple pairs can generate 2-3 RED FLAG lines per minute

medium_priority_issues.root_cause: 15 min window is per-pair, not system-wide. High-opportunity pairs may generate multiple RED FLAGS.

impact.noise_vs_signal: INFO/ERROR lines for same issue repeating every 1-2 min

medium_priority_issues.recommendation: May need to extend to 30 min or change throttle strategy (first ERROR, rest DEBUG).

question_1_trailing_sl.question: Is trailing stop loss working properly?
question_1_trailing_sl.answer: UNVERIFIED - Evidence suggests may not be working correctly
question_1_trailing_sl.details: EUR/JPY SELL trade exited at SL with 28.22 pips loss, but SL range was 160 pips. If trailing SL working, loss should have been limited. Need verification of ATR_TRAILING implementation in Scalp-Engine.

question_2_atr_stages.question: Is the Structure_ATR Stages SL working properly?
question_2_atr_stages.answer: UNKNOWN - No clear evidence in logs
question_2_atr_stages.details: Config shows ATR_TRAILING but no detail on 'Structure_ATR Stages'. May refer to multi-stage ATR calculation. Logs show ATR_TRAILING but not intermediate stages.

question_3_manual_closes.question: What is causing profitable trades with trailing stops to close as losing trades?
question_3_manual_closes.answer: ROOT CAUSE UNKNOWN - 80% of trades closed manually
question_3_manual_closes.details: 8 of 10 closed trades were manual closes (MARKET_ORDER TRADE_CLOSE), not automated TP/SL. Many closed seconds after entry at small losses. Root cause unclear - could be UI button, auto-close bug, risk manager, or user intervention. Requires investigation of all close paths.

question_4_rl_learning.question: Do the RL run properly?
question_4_rl_learning.details: No clear logs of daily_learning() running or evaluating outcomes. RL database exists but verification of learning cycle execution missing. Requires Render logs review or manual verification.

question_5_trading_hours.question: Is the trading hours logic being properly enforced?
question_5_trading_hours.details: TradingHoursManager exists but logs do not show 'Weekend blocked' or similar. Weekend trades observed on Feb 22 (Saturday). Enforcement mechanism unclear.

question_6_sync.question: Is the sync (Open/Pending Trades) between Oanda, Scalp-engine UI and Scalp-engine correct?
question_6_sync.details: UI open trades count may not match OANDA at all times. No clear sync logs showing successful match. POST /trades updates every cycle but lag possible. Recommend manual comparison.

question_7_orphan_trades.question: Are there still orphan trades on Oanda that are not accounted for on Scalp-engine and Scalp-engine UI?
question_7_orphan_trades.answer: UNVERIFIED - No evidence of orphans, but not explicitly checked
question_7_orphan_trades.details: No orphan trades evident in logs reviewed, but _sync_with_oanda() at startup should catch any. Manual verification needed by comparing OANDA open trades to execution_history.json.

immediate_actions: DEBUG max_runs auto-reset logic - 50+ blocked trades on Feb 27
INVESTIGATE manual trade closures - 80% rate is abnormal
VERIFY trailing SL implementation - EUR/JPY loss suggests may not be working
FIX consensus denominator calculation - showing /4 when only 2-3 LLMs available
RECOVER Claude API credits or disable Claude - missing 25% of LLM coverage
phase_1_before_live: Complete audit of all close paths (Scalp-Engine, UI, risk manager)
Add logging for trading hours enforcement checks
Add logging for position size calculation formula
Implement continuous sync monitoring with mismatch alerts
Fix duplicate blocking to allow 5+ pip improvements
phase_2_optimization: Fix DeepSeek parser or disable DeepSeek
Reduce order replacement frequency or increase min pip threshold
Extend RED FLAG throttle to 30 min or change to DEBUG tier
Add Claude API credit monitoring and limits
Implement orphan trade detection on every cycle
phase_3_validation: Run 10+ profitable days in demo before live trading
Verify all 7 quality checklist items pass
Confirm RL daily learning is running and updating weights
Test trading hours enforcement on next weekend
Validate consensus denominator for all LLM combinations

not_ready_for_live_trading_reasons: 0% win rate (0 wins, 10 losses) - far below acceptable threshold
Manual closures at 80% indicate fundamental issue with auto-close logic
Trailing SL unverified and appears broken (EUR/JPY loss)
Claude API exhausted - missing 25% of LLM coverage
DeepSeek not parsing - missing 25% of LLM coverage (but overlaps with consensus)
Consensus denominator wrong - showing /4 when only /2-3 available
RL learning unverified - system not learning from experience
Duplicate blocking too aggressive - prevents trade improvements
Sync mismatches possible - open/pending trades may be wrong
